schema.description: Payload for creating a run. **Important**: If the agent uses an input form trigger, the `input` field is required and must include all fields defined in the form schema. Even fields marked as optional in the UI must be included in the request—use an empty string (`""`) for optional fields without values. Omitting required form fields will result in a 500 error.

agent_id.title: Agent Id
agent_id.description: The ID of the agent to run.

input.title: Input
input.description: The input to the agent. Required when the agent uses an input form trigger.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: The messages to pass an input to the agent.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: The metadata to pass to the agent.

schema.title: AgentRunCreate
